title: alsophila glabra
intro: Alsophila glabra, also known as the Black Tree Fern, is a species of fern that is native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The leaves of the Alsophila glabra can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
